title: Run your own weed operation
description: The hidden farm is now a full business. Buy seeds in three strains at the General Store — each grows, drinks and pays differently — feed and water your plants, then dry and cure the harvest for a fatter price. You no longer sell on the spot: stash the crop, strap on a backpack and deliver it to buyers out in the country and the city. Watch the heat, though — push your luck and a deal can turn into a police sting or a raid on the farm.

title: Farm upgrades & a proper store
description: Reinvest your earnings at the grow shack: a bigger can, a garden hose, or sprinklers that water the beds for you. The farm is now lit at night so you can work after dark, and the General Store got a full glow-up inside and out.

title: The General Store is open
description: Drop by the country store on the village main street and step inside. Buy seed packs at the counter — and you'll want to, because the garden now needs seeds before you can plant anything.

title: Thicker forest, smoother menus
description: The countryside is wilder now, with denser pine forest spreading across the peninsula. The pause menu also lays out better on phones, so it's easier to read and tap on the go.

title: See what's new
description: This very screen is new! The pause menu now has an Updates panel that lists everything we add to the game, in plain language. A little NEW badge lets you know whenever there's something fresh to read.

title: All-new pause menu
description: Hit pause at any time to open a proper menu. From one place you can check the global leaderboard, browse your full money history, change graphics and sound, go fullscreen, switch account, or quit to the title screen.

title: Sail to Paradise Isle
description: Grab a boat and head out to sea. There's a brand-new tropical island waiting offshore that you can land on and explore on foot.

title: Louder, sharper sound
description: Police sirens now wail like the real thing, and the whole world is full of new sound effects that react to what's happening around you.

title: A livelier countryside
description: The rural village got a football pitch behind the church, friendlier locals wandering the streets, and the occasional truck rumbling down the dirt roads. The mountain is smoother to drive over, too.

title: First-person view
description: Press C to switch to a first-person camera. On foot you'll see your own hands and weapon; behind the wheel you get a detailed cockpit with hands gripping the steering wheel.

title: New town: Pine Hollow
description: A whole rural town has sprung up east of the mountain. Explore Pine Hollow with its dense pine forest, fort and farms — you can even climb aboard a tractor and drive it.

title: A hidden grow-op
description: There's a secret weed-farm mini-game tucked away in the countryside, waiting for players who go exploring off the beaten path.

title: More to do, more to win
description: New activities, weapons and a fresh island arrived — each activity now has its own leaderboard. Boat races also got explosive water mines to dodge.

title: Your progress is saved
description: Your money and progress now stick around between sessions, so you can pick up right where you left off. The in-game clock is synced to real time and shows the day of the week.

title: Full map & smoother play
description: Press M to open a full map of the world, with clearer icons on the minimap. The whole game also runs noticeably smoother now.

title: Guns & speedboats
description: Pick up guns and tear across the water in a Vice City-style speedboat that leaves a foamy wake behind it.

title: Welcome to Tiny Crime
description: The world opened up: a house and safe house to call home, motorcycles to ride, street races to win, a gym to train at, plus a prison, a hospital, talking pedestrians and the very first story missions.
